agentsfleet-runner — host-resident runner daemon + operator CLI

Usage:
  agentsfleet-runner                     run the daemon (bare; reads the env)
  agentsfleet-runner <command> [flags]
  agentsfleet-runner --version | --help

Commands:
  status     show registration + fleet directive
  doctor     preflight env + control-plane reachability

Flags:
  --api <url>      control-plane base URL (else ZOMBIE_API_URL)
  --json           machine-readable output (auto when piped)
  --version, -V    print version
  --help, -h       show this help

Environment:
  ZOMBIE_API_URL        control-plane base URL
  ZOMBIE_RUNNER_TOKEN   this host's zrn_ token (daemon/status/doctor)
  RUNNER_HOST_ID        stable host identifier (daemon)
